# Faqir Recipes Reference

21 recipes, each with its anatomy tree, variant table, and safe/unsafe transforms ‚Äî all derived from the component manifest.

## accordion

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: data-display ¬∑ controller: createAccordion()_

Expandable section panels with single or multiple expand modes

```html
<div data-ui="accordion" data-variant="{type}" id="{id}">
  <div data-part="item" data-state="collapsed">
    <button data-part="trigger" id="{id}-trigger-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="{id}-content-1">
      <span>{label1}</span>
      <span data-part="icon" aria-hidden="true">‚ñæ</span>
    </button>
    <div data-part="content" id="{id}-content-1" role="region" aria-labelledby="{id}-trigger-1" hidden>{content1}</div>
  </div>
  <div data-part="item" data-state="collapsed">
    <button data-part="trigger" id="{id}-trigger-2" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="{id}-content-2">
      <span>{label2}</span>
      <span data-part="icon" aria-hidden="true">‚ñæ</span>
    </button>
    <div data-part="content" id="{id}-content-2" role="region" aria-labelledby="{id}-trigger-2" hidden>{content2}</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='accordion']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='item']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Individual accordion section container
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that toggles the section, has aria-expanded and aria-controls
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='content']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Collapsible content region with role=region and aria-labelledby
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Chevron icon that rotates when expanded
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| type | `single`, `multiple` | `single` | `data-variant` | root |
| bordered | `true`, `false` | `false` | `data-bordered` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-item`, `remove-item`, `change-variant-type`, `toggle-bordered`, `restyle-trigger-background`, `change-icon`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-aria-expanded`, `remove-aria-controls`, `remove-region-role`, `remove-aria-labelledby`, `remove-keyboard-handler`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter, Space
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-expanded on trigger`; `aria-controls on trigger pointing to content id`; `role="region" on content`; `aria-labelledby on content pointing to trigger id`

## alert-dialog

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: overlay ¬∑ controller: createAlertDialog()_

Interruptive confirmation dialog (role=alertdialog) for destructive or irreversible actions

```html
<div data-ui="alert-dialog" data-state="closed" id="{id}"{confirm_required}>
  <button data-part="trigger">{trigger_text}</button>
  <div data-part="overlay" hidden></div>
  <div data-part="panel" role="alertdialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="{id}-title" aria-describedby="{id}-desc" data-variant="{tone}" data-size="{size}" hidden>
    <div data-part="header">
      <h2 id="{id}-title" data-part="title">{title}</h2>
    </div>
    <div data-part="body">
      <p id="{id}-desc" data-part="description">{description}</p>
    </div>
    <div data-part="footer">
      <button data-ui="button" data-part="cancel" data-variant="outline">{cancel_text}</button>
      <button data-ui="button" data-part="confirm" data-variant="destructive">{confirm_text}</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='alert-dialog']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that opens the alert dialog
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='overlay']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Backdrop overlay ‚Äî visual only; clicking it does NOT close an alertdialog
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='panel']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The alert box; carries role=alertdialog and aria-modal
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='title']  <h2>  required  ‚Äî Linked via aria-labelledby to the panel
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='description']  <p>  required  ‚Äî The alert message; REQUIRED and linked via aria-describedby to the panel
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='body']  <div>  required
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='footer']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Action row; least-destructive action first in reading order
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='cancel']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Least-destructive action; receives focus on open and emits faqir:cancel
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='confirm']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Proceeds with the action; emits a cancelable faqir:confirm (preventDefault keeps the dialog open for async work)
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='close']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Optional dismiss; treated as a cancel (emits faqir:cancel)
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md` | `sm` | `data-size` | panel |
| tone | `default`, `destructive` | `destructive` | `data-variant` | panel |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant-size`, `change-variant-tone`, `swap-close-animation`, `restyle-panel-background`, `customize-overlay-opacity`, `relabel-actions`, `toggle-confirm-required`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-focus-trap`, `change-panel-role`, `remove-aria-modal`, `remove-aria-labelledby`, `remove-aria-describedby`, `remove-confirm-action`, `enable-overlay-dismiss`, `remove-overlay`
- **A11y:** role=alertdialog ¬∑ aria-modal ¬∑ focus-trap ¬∑ escape-closes ¬∑ return-focus‚Üítrigger ¬∑ keys: Escape, Tab, Shift+Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `role="alertdialog" on panel`; `aria-modal="true" on panel`; `aria-labelledby pointing to title id`; `aria-describedby pointing to description id`

## calendar

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: forms ¬∑ controller: createCalendar()_

Standalone month-grid calendar with roving-tabindex keyboard navigation, min/max/disabled dates, and single or range selection ‚Äî extracted from date-picker so availability grids and range pickers can use it directly

```html
<div data-ui="calendar" data-size="{size}">
  <div data-part="header">
    <button data-part="nav-prev" type="button" aria-label="Previous month">&lsaquo;</button>
    <span data-part="month-label"></span>
    <button data-part="nav-next" type="button" aria-label="Next month">&rsaquo;</button>
  </div>
  <table data-part="grid" role="grid" aria-label="Calendar">
    <thead><tr><th>Su</th><th>Mo</th><th>Tu</th><th>We</th><th>Th</th><th>Fr</th><th>Sa</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody data-part="grid-body"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='calendar']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Row holding the month navigation buttons and the month label
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='nav-prev']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Navigate to previous month; auto-disabled when the whole previous month is before data-min
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='nav-next']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Navigate to next month; auto-disabled when the whole next month is after data-max
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='month-label']  <span>  required  ‚Äî Displays current month and year
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='grid']  <table>  required  ‚Äî Calendar grid with role=grid and an aria-label
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='grid-body']  <tbody>  required  ‚Äî Body the controller fills with week rows of day buttons
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='day']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Individual day button ‚Äî generated by the controller, never authored by hand
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `restyle-selected-day`, `restyle-today-highlight`, `restyle-range-band`, `add-min-max-date`, `add-disabled-dates`, `change-first-day-of-week`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-grid-role`, `remove-day-aria-labels`, `remove-keyboard-navigation`, `remove-roving-tabindex`, `hand-author-day-cells`
- **A11y:** keys: ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Home, End, PageUp, PageDown, Shift+PageUp, Shift+PageDown, Enter/Space
- **Required ARIA:** `role="grid" on grid`; `aria-label on grid`; `aria-label on day buttons with full date`; `aria-label on nav-prev and nav-next`; `aria-selected="true" on selected day(s)`; `aria-disabled="true" on out-of-range or disabled days (kept focusable for the roving tabindex)`

## combobox

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: forms ¬∑ controller: createCombobox()_

Autocomplete input with filtered dropdown list for type-ahead search

```html
<div data-ui="combobox" data-state="closed" data-size="{size}">
  <input data-part="input" type="text" role="combobox" aria-expanded="false" aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="{id}-listbox" placeholder="{placeholder}">
  <ul data-part="listbox" role="listbox" id="{id}-listbox" hidden>
    <li data-part="option" role="option" aria-selected="false">{option1}</li>
    <li data-part="option" role="option" aria-selected="false">{option2}</li>
    <li data-part="empty" hidden>No results found</li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='combobox']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='input']  <input>  required  ‚Äî Text input with role=combobox for type-ahead search
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='listbox']  <ul>  required  ‚Äî Dropdown list container with role=listbox
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='option']  <li>  required  ‚Äî Individual option with role=option
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='empty']  <li>  optional  ‚Äî Empty state message shown when no options match the filter
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-option`, `remove-option`, `change-size`, `change-placeholder`, `restyle-listbox-background`, `customize-empty-message`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-combobox-role`, `remove-listbox-role`, `remove-option-role`, `remove-aria-expanded`, `remove-aria-autocomplete`, `remove-keyboard-navigation`
- **A11y:** keys: ArrowDown, ArrowUp, Enter, Escape, Home, End
- **Required ARIA:** `role="combobox" on input`; `aria-expanded on input`; `aria-autocomplete="list" on input`; `aria-controls on input pointing to listbox id`; `role="listbox" on listbox`; `role="option" on each option`; `aria-selected on active option`

## command-palette

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: navigation ¬∑ controller: createCommandPalette()_

Cmd+K style modal command interface with search and keyboard navigation

```html
<div data-ui="command-palette" data-state="closed">
  <div data-part="overlay" hidden></div>
  <div data-part="panel" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Command palette" data-size="{size}" hidden>
    <div data-part="search-wrapper">
      <input data-part="search" type="text" role="combobox" aria-expanded="true" aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="{id}-list" placeholder="Type a command or search...">
    </div>
    <div data-part="list" role="listbox" id="{id}-list">
      <div data-part="group">
        <div data-part="group-label">{group_label}</div>
        <div data-part="item" role="option" aria-selected="false">
          <span data-part="item-label">{item_label}</span>
          <kbd data-part="kbd">{shortcut}</kbd>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div data-part="empty" hidden>No commands found</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='command-palette']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='overlay']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Backdrop overlay, click to close
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='panel']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The command palette dialog container
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='search']  <input>  required  ‚Äî Search input with role=combobox for filtering commands
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='list']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Scrollable list container with role=listbox
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='group']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Group container with label and items
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='item']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Individual command item with role=option
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='empty']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Empty state shown when no commands match
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='kbd']  <kbd>  optional  ‚Äî Keyboard shortcut hint displayed in items
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | panel |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-command-item`, `remove-command-item`, `add-group`, `remove-group`, `change-panel-size`, `change-placeholder`, `restyle-panel-background`, `customize-empty-message`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-dialog-role`, `remove-aria-modal`, `remove-focus-trap`, `remove-escape-handler`, `remove-keyboard-navigation`, `remove-global-shortcut`
- **A11y:** role=dialog ¬∑ aria-modal ¬∑ focus-trap ¬∑ escape-closes ¬∑ keys: Cmd+K / Ctrl+K, Escape, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, Enter, Home, End
- **Required ARIA:** `role="dialog" on panel`; `aria-modal="true" on panel`; `aria-label on panel`; `role="combobox" on search input`; `role="listbox" on list`; `role="option" on each item`

## date-picker

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: forms ¬∑ controller: createDatePicker()_

Date input with calendar dropdown for date selection ‚Äî the month grid is the nested `calendar` recipe

```html
<div data-ui="date-picker" data-state="closed" data-size="{size}">
  <div data-part="trigger">
    <input data-part="input" type="text" placeholder="Select a date" readonly aria-haspopup="dialog" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Choose date">
    <span data-part="icon" aria-hidden="true">&#x1F4C5;</span>
  </div>
  <div data-part="calendar" role="dialog" aria-label="Date picker" hidden>
    <div data-ui="calendar" data-size="{size}">
      <div data-part="header">
        <button data-part="nav-prev" type="button" aria-label="Previous month">&lsaquo;</button>
        <span data-part="month-label"></span>
        <button data-part="nav-next" type="button" aria-label="Next month">&rsaquo;</button>
      </div>
      <table data-part="grid" role="grid" aria-label="Calendar">
        <thead><tr><th>Su</th><th>Mo</th><th>Tu</th><th>We</th><th>Th</th><th>Fr</th><th>Sa</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody data-part="grid-body"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='date-picker']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Clickable area containing input and icon
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='input']  <input>  required  ‚Äî Text input displaying the selected date
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Decorative calendar glyph inside the trigger (aria-hidden)
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='calendar']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Calendar dropdown container. Canonically nests a [data-ui='calendar'] recipe that owns the header, month navigation and day grid; legacy markup with those parts placed directly inside this container keeps working
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `customize-date-format`, `restyle-selected-day`, `restyle-today-highlight`, `add-min-max-date`, `change-first-day-of-week`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-aria-expanded`, `remove-grid-role`, `remove-day-aria-labels`, `remove-keyboard-navigation`, `remove-outside-click-handler`, `duplicate-grid-logic-outside-calendar-recipe`
- **A11y:** keys: Escape, Enter/Space, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Home, End, PageUp, PageDown
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-haspopup="dialog" on input`; `aria-expanded on input`; `role="dialog" and aria-label on the calendar container`; `role="grid" on the nested calendar grid`; `aria-label on day buttons with full date`; `aria-label on nav-prev and nav-next`; `aria-selected="true" on selected day`

## dialog

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: overlay ¬∑ controller: createDialog()_

Modal dialog with focus trap, escape-to-close, and overlay backdrop

```html
<div data-ui="dialog" data-state="closed" id="{id}">
  <button data-part="trigger">{trigger_text}</button>
  <div data-part="overlay" hidden></div>
  <div data-part="panel" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="{id}-title" data-size="{size}" hidden>
    <div data-part="header">
      <h2 id="{id}-title" data-part="title">{title}</h2>
      <button data-part="close" aria-label="Close dialog">‚úï</button>
    </div>
    <div data-part="body">{body}</div>
    <div data-part="footer">{footer}</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='dialog']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that opens the dialog
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='overlay']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Backdrop overlay, click to close
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='panel']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The dialog box container
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='title']  <h2>  required  ‚Äî Linked via aria-labelledby to panel
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='description']  <p>  optional  ‚Äî Optional, linked via aria-describedby if present
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='body']  <div>  required
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='footer']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Action buttons area
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='close']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Close button, must have aria-label
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg`, `full` | `md` | `data-size` | panel |
| tone | `default`, `danger` | `default` | `data-variant` | panel |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant-size`, `change-variant-tone`, `add-description-slot`, `swap-close-animation`, `restyle-panel-background`, `add-form-to-body`, `customize-overlay-opacity`, `add-header-slot`, `modify-footer-buttons`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-focus-trap`, `remove-escape-handler`, `remove-aria-labelledby`, `remove-overlay`, `remove-close-button`, `change-panel-role`, `remove-aria-modal`
- **A11y:** role=dialog ¬∑ aria-modal ¬∑ focus-trap ¬∑ escape-closes ¬∑ return-focus‚Üítrigger ¬∑ keys: Escape, Tab, Shift+Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `role="dialog" on panel`; `aria-modal="true" on panel`; `aria-labelledby pointing to title id`; `aria-label on close button`

## drawer

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: overlay ¬∑ controller: createDrawer()_

Side panel that slides in from screen edge with overlay backdrop

```html
<div data-ui="drawer" data-state="closed" id="{id}">
  <button data-part="trigger">{trigger_text}</button>
  <div data-part="overlay" hidden></div>
  <div data-part="panel" data-variant="{side}" data-size="{size}" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="{id}-title" hidden>
    <div data-part="header">
      <h2 id="{id}-title" data-part="title">{title}</h2>
      <button data-part="close" aria-label="Close drawer">‚úï</button>
    </div>
    <div data-part="body">{body}</div>
    <div data-part="footer">{footer}</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='drawer']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that opens the drawer
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='overlay']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Backdrop overlay, click to close
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='panel']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The drawer panel container
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Header area containing title and close button
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='title']  <h2>  required  ‚Äî Linked via aria-labelledby to panel
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='body']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Scrollable content area
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='footer']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Action buttons area
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='close']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Close button, must have aria-label
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| side | `left`, `right` | `left` | `data-variant` | panel |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg`, `full` | `md` | `data-size` | panel |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant-side`, `change-variant-size`, `restyle-panel-background`, `add-form-to-body`, `customize-overlay-opacity`, `modify-footer-buttons`, `swap-slide-animation`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-focus-trap`, `remove-escape-handler`, `remove-aria-labelledby`, `remove-overlay`, `remove-close-button`, `change-panel-role`, `remove-aria-modal`
- **A11y:** role=dialog ¬∑ aria-modal ¬∑ focus-trap ¬∑ escape-closes ¬∑ return-focus‚Üítrigger ¬∑ keys: Escape, Tab, Shift+Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `role="dialog" on panel`; `aria-modal="true" on panel`; `aria-labelledby pointing to title id`; `aria-label on close button`

## dropdown

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: navigation ¬∑ controller: createDropdown()_

Dropdown menu with keyboard navigation and click-outside-to-close

```html
<div data-ui="dropdown" data-state="closed">
  <button data-part="trigger" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false">{trigger_text}</button>
  <div data-part="menu" role="menu" hidden>
    <button data-part="item" role="menuitem">{item1}</button>
    <button data-part="item" role="menuitem">{item2}</button>
    <hr data-part="separator">
    <button data-part="item" role="menuitem">{item3}</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='dropdown']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that toggles the dropdown menu
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='menu']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The dropdown menu container with role=menu
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='item']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Individual menu item with role=menuitem
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='separator']  <hr>  optional  ‚Äî Visual separator between menu item groups
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| align | `start`, `end` | `start` | `data-variant` | menu |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-menu-item`, `remove-menu-item`, `add-separator`, `change-alignment`, `change-size`, `restyle-menu-background`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-menu-role`, `remove-menuitem-role`, `remove-aria-expanded`, `remove-keyboard-navigation`, `remove-click-outside-handler`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter, Space, Escape, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, Home, End
- **Required ARIA:** `role="menu" on menu`; `role="menuitem" on each item`; `aria-expanded on trigger`; `aria-haspopup="true" on trigger`

## input-otp

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: form ¬∑ controller: createInputOtp()_

Segmented one-time-code input ‚Äî N visual segments over a single hidden real input, with paste distribution, auto-advance, backspace-back, and a fire-once complete event

```html
<div data-ui="input-otp" data-length="6" data-mode="numeric">
  <input data-part="input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="one-time-code" pattern="[0-9]*" maxlength="6" autocapitalize="off" autocorrect="off" spellcheck="false" aria-label="One-time code" />
  <div data-part="segments" aria-hidden="true">
    <div data-part="segment"></div>
    <div data-part="segment"></div>
    <div data-part="segment"></div>
    <div data-part="segment"></div>
    <div data-part="segment"></div>
    <div data-part="segment"></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='input-otp']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='input']  <input>  required  ‚Äî The single real text input. Transparent and stretched over the segments, it owns focus, typing, paste, selection and mobile SMS autofill. Carries the accessible name, autocomplete="one-time-code", inputmode and maxlength.
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='segments']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Decorative row that visually mirrors the input's value. Marked aria-hidden because the real input is the accessible control.
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='segment']  <div>  required  ‚Äî One visual cell per character. The controller reflects data-filled, data-active and data-caret onto these; count is reconciled to data-length at init.
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |
| mode | `numeric`, `alphanumeric` | `numeric` | `data-mode` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-length`, `change-mode`, `change-initial-value`, `change-size`, `toggle-disabled`, `relabel-input`, `restyle-segment`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-real-input`, `split-into-per-segment-inputs`, `remove-autocomplete-one-time-code`, `remove-input-accessible-name`, `make-segments-focusable`, `remove-aria-hidden-from-segments`
- **A11y:** keys: 0-9 / a-z, Backspace, Delete, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, End, Paste
- **Required ARIA:** `autocomplete="one-time-code" on input`; `aria-label on input`

## pagination

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: navigation ¬∑ controller: createPagination()_

Page navigation with numbered controls, previous/next, and ellipsis

```html
<div data-ui="pagination" data-size="{size}">
  <nav data-part="nav" role="navigation" aria-label="Pagination">
    <button data-part="prev" aria-label="Previous page">&laquo; Prev</button>
    <button data-part="page" data-page="1" data-state="active" aria-current="page">1</button>
    <button data-part="page" data-page="2">2</button>
    <span data-part="ellipsis">&hellip;</span>
    <button data-part="page" data-page="{total}">{total}</button>
    <button data-part="next" aria-label="Next page">Next &raquo;</button>
  </nav>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='pagination']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='nav']  <nav>  required  ‚Äî Navigation container with role=navigation
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='prev']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Previous page button
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='next']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Next page button
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='page']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Individual page number button
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='ellipsis']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Ellipsis indicator for skipped pages
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-size`, `add-page-buttons`, `remove-ellipsis`, `restyle-active-page`, `change-prev-next-text`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-navigation-role`, `remove-aria-current`, `remove-aria-labels`, `remove-disabled-state`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter/Space, Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `role="navigation" on nav`; `aria-label="Pagination" on nav`; `aria-current="page" on active page button`; `aria-label on prev button`; `aria-label on next button`

## popover

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: overlay ¬∑ controller: createPopover()_

Content popup anchored to a trigger element with click toggle

```html
<div data-ui="popover" data-state="closed">
  <button data-part="trigger" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false">{trigger_text}</button>
  <div data-part="content" data-variant="{position}" data-align="{align}" hidden>
    {content}
    <button data-part="close" aria-label="Close popover">‚úï</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='popover']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that toggles the popover content
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='content']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The popover content container
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='close']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Optional close button inside content
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| position | `top`, `bottom`, `left`, `right` | `bottom` | `data-variant` | content |
| align | `start`, `center`, `end` | `start` | `data-align` | content |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-position`, `change-alignment`, `restyle-content-background`, `add-content`, `remove-close-button`, `customize-arrow`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-aria-expanded`, `remove-aria-haspopup`, `remove-click-outside-handler`, `remove-escape-handler`
- **A11y:** keys: Escape, Enter/Space
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-expanded on trigger`; `aria-haspopup on trigger`

## qr-code

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: data-display ¬∑ controller: createQrCode()_

SVG QR code generator from text input with configurable size and error correction

```html
<div data-ui="qr-code" data-value="{url}" data-size="{size}" data-ecl="{ecl}" role="img" aria-label="QR code: {url}"></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='qr-code']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='svg']  <svg>  optional  ‚Äî Generated SVG QR code (created by controller)
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='caption']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Optional text label below the QR code
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |
| ecl | `L`, `M`, `Q`, `H` | `M` | `data-ecl` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-value`, `change-size`, `change-ecl`, `add-caption`, `remove-caption`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-aria-label`, `remove-role`
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label describing the QR code content`; `role="img" on the container`

## select-custom

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: forms ¬∑ controller: createSelectCustom()_

Custom styled select dropdown with search filtering and keyboard navigation

```html
<div data-ui="select-custom" data-state="closed" data-size="{size}">
  <button data-part="trigger" role="combobox" aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-controls="{id}-listbox">
    <span data-part="value" data-placeholder>{placeholder}</span>
    <span data-part="chevron" aria-hidden="true">&#x25BE;</span>
  </button>
  <div data-part="listbox" role="listbox" id="{id}-listbox" hidden>
    <div data-part="option" role="option" aria-selected="false" data-value="{val1}">{label1}</div>
    <div data-part="option" role="option" aria-selected="false" data-value="{val2}">{label2}</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='select-custom']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that toggles the select dropdown
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='value']  <span>  required  ‚Äî Displays the currently selected value or placeholder
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='listbox']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Dropdown container with role=listbox
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='option']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Individual option with role=option and data-value
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='search']  <input>  optional  ‚Äî Optional search input to filter options
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='empty']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Empty state message when no options match the filter
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-option`, `remove-option`, `add-search`, `remove-search`, `change-size`, `change-placeholder`, `restyle-listbox-background`, `customize-empty-message`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-combobox-role`, `remove-listbox-role`, `remove-option-role`, `remove-aria-expanded`, `remove-aria-haspopup`, `remove-keyboard-navigation`, `remove-click-outside-handler`
- **A11y:** keys: Enter / Space, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, Enter, Escape, Home, End
- **Required ARIA:** `role="combobox" on trigger`; `aria-expanded on trigger`; `aria-haspopup="listbox" on trigger`; `aria-controls on trigger pointing to listbox id`; `role="listbox" on listbox`; `role="option" on each option`; `aria-selected on options`

## sheet

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: overlay ¬∑ controller: createSheet()_

Mobile-friendly bottom or side sheet that slides in from screen edge

```html
<div data-ui="sheet" data-state="closed" id="{id}">
  <button data-part="trigger">{trigger_text}</button>
  <div data-part="overlay" hidden></div>
  <div data-part="panel" data-variant="{side}" data-size="{size}" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="{id}-title" hidden>
    <div data-part="header">
      <h2 id="{id}-title" data-part="title">{title}</h2>
      <button data-part="close" aria-label="Close sheet">‚úï</button>
    </div>
    <div data-part="body">{body}</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='sheet']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Button that opens the sheet
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='overlay']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Backdrop overlay, click to close
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='panel']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The sheet panel container
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Header area containing title and close button
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='title']  <h2>  required  ‚Äî Linked via aria-labelledby to panel
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='body']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Scrollable content area
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='close']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Close button, must have aria-label
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| side | `bottom`, `top`, `left`, `right` | `bottom` | `data-variant` | panel |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | panel |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-variant-side`, `change-variant-size`, `restyle-panel-background`, `add-content-to-body`, `customize-overlay-opacity`, `modify-border-radius`, `swap-slide-animation`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-focus-trap`, `remove-escape-handler`, `remove-aria-labelledby`, `remove-overlay`, `remove-close-button`, `change-panel-role`, `remove-aria-modal`
- **A11y:** role=dialog ¬∑ aria-modal ¬∑ focus-trap ¬∑ escape-closes ¬∑ return-focus‚Üítrigger ¬∑ keys: Escape, Tab, Shift+Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `role="dialog" on panel`; `aria-modal="true" on panel`; `aria-labelledby pointing to title id`; `aria-label on close button`

## sidebar

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: navigation ¬∑ controller: createSidebar()_

Collapsible application sidebar with three modes ‚Äî expanded, rail (icons only), and a mobile off-canvas drawer ‚Äî switched responsively and toggled from the keyboard

```html
<div data-ui="sidebar" data-state="{state}" id="{id}">
  <div data-part="overlay" hidden></div>
  <aside data-part="panel" aria-label="Primary navigation">
    <div data-part="header">
      <a data-part="brand" href="#"><span data-part="brand-icon" aria-hidden="true">{brand_icon}</span><span data-part="brand-label">{brand}</span></a>
      <button data-part="trigger" aria-label="Toggle sidebar" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="{id}">{toggle_icon}</button>
    </div>
    <nav data-part="nav" aria-label="Main">
      <a data-part="item" href="#" aria-current="page"><span data-part="icon" aria-hidden="true">{icon}</span><span data-part="label">{label}</span></a>
    </nav>
    <div data-part="footer">{footer}</div>
  </aside>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='sidebar']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='overlay']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Backdrop shown behind the panel when the mobile drawer is open; click to close
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='panel']  <aside>  required  ‚Äî The sidebar surface itself ‚Äî the focus-trap container in drawer mode. Should carry aria-label
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='header']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Top area holding the brand and the toggle button
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='brand']  <a>  optional  ‚Äî Product/brand lockup (icon + label)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='brand-icon']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Brand glyph; stays visible in rail mode
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='brand-label']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Brand wordmark; hidden in rail mode
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Toggle button inside the panel. Its aria-expanded tracks the live state. External buttons may also target the sidebar via data-sidebar-toggle="{id}"
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='nav']  <nav>  optional  ‚Äî Navigation region; should carry aria-label
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='item']  <a>  optional  ‚Äî A navigation entry (icon + label). Mark the current page with aria-current="page". In rail mode give it an aria-label since the text label is hidden
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Item glyph; stays visible in rail mode
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='label']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Item text; hidden in rail mode
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='footer']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Pinned bottom area (secondary links, user block)
```

**Variants**

_No variants._

- **Safe transforms:** `change-initial-state`, `change-breakpoint`, `add-nav-item`, `reorder-nav-items`, `set-active-item`, `add-footer-block`, `restyle-panel-background`, `change-sidebar-width`, `swap-brand`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-panel`, `remove-focus-trap`, `remove-escape-handler`, `remove-overlay`, `remove-trigger-aria-expanded`, `remove-panel-aria-label`, `invent-new-data-state-value`
- **A11y:** role=navigation ¬∑ focus-trap ¬∑ escape-closes ¬∑ return-focus‚Üítrigger ¬∑ keys: Enter/Space, Escape, Tab, Shift+Tab
- **Required ARIA:** `aria-label on panel`; `aria-expanded on trigger`

## slider

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: form ¬∑ controller: createSlider()_

Draggable range input with single-thumb and two-thumb (range) modes, full keyboard control, and screen-reader-correct ARIA

```html
<div data-ui="slider" data-variant="single" data-min="0" data-max="100" data-step="1" data-value="{value}" style="--slider-start: 0%; --slider-end: {value}%">
  <div data-part="track">
    <div data-part="range"></div>
    <div data-part="thumb" role="slider" tabindex="0" aria-label="{label}" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" aria-valuenow="{value}" style="--pos: {value}%"></div>
  </div>
  <output data-part="output">{value}</output>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='slider']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='track']  <div>  required  ‚Äî The rail the thumb(s) travel along; establishes the positioning context and the drag hit-area
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='range']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Filled portion between the start of the track and the thumb (single) or between the two thumbs (range)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='thumb']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Draggable handle with role=slider; one for single mode, two for range mode. Carries aria-valuemin/max/now and is keyboard-focusable
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='output']  <output>  optional  ‚Äî Optional live text display of the current value
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| type | `single`, `range` | `single` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-min-max-step`, `change-initial-value`, `add-value-suffix`, `toggle-output`, `change-size`, `single-to-range`, `toggle-disabled`, `restyle-thumb`, `restyle-track`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-role-slider`, `remove-aria-valuemin`, `remove-aria-valuemax`, `remove-aria-valuenow`, `remove-thumb-tabindex`, `remove-keyboard-handler`, `remove-track`
- **A11y:** role=slider ¬∑ keys: ArrowRight, ArrowUp, ArrowLeft, ArrowDown, PageUp, PageDown, Home, End
- **Required ARIA:** `role="slider" on each thumb`; `aria-valuemin on thumb`; `aria-valuemax on thumb`; `aria-valuenow on thumb`; `aria-label on thumb`

## table

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: data-display ¬∑ controller: createTable()_

Advanced data table: multi-column type-aware sorting, global + per-column filtering, tree data and collapsible row groups with live aggregates, inline cell editing with Intl number/currency formatting, drag-and-drop row and column reordering, column resize/hide/pin, sticky header/footer/rows, grid keyboard navigation, CSV export, responsive stacked mode, and state persistence ‚Äî every feature opt-in via data attributes

```html
<div data-ui="table" data-size="{size}">
  <table data-part="table">
    <thead data-part="thead">
      <tr data-part="tr">
        <th data-part="th" scope="col"><input data-part="checkbox" type="checkbox" aria-label="Select all rows"></th>
        <th data-part="th" scope="col" data-sortable aria-sort="none">{col1}</th>
        <th data-part="th" scope="col" data-sortable aria-sort="none">{col2}</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody data-part="tbody">
      <tr data-part="tr">
        <td data-part="td"><input data-part="checkbox" type="checkbox" aria-label="Select row"></td>
        <td data-part="td">{val1}</td>
        <td data-part="td">{val2}</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='table']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='table']  <table>  required  ‚Äî The table element
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='thead']  <thead>  required  ‚Äî Table header section
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='tbody']  <tbody>  required  ‚Äî Table body section
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='tr']  <tr>  required  ‚Äî Table row. Optional: data-level (tree depth), data-row-id, data-pin='top' (sticky row)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='th']  <th>  required  ‚Äî Header cell with scope=col. Optional: data-sortable, data-type, data-format, data-align, data-editable, data-readonly, data-pin='start|end', data-hide-below='sm|md|lg', data-key, data-min-width, data-max-width, data-no-resize, data-csv-skip
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='td']  <td>  required  ‚Äî Data cell. Optional: data-value (raw value), data-sort-value, data-format, data-align, data-editable, data-readonly, data-aggregate='sum|avg|min|max|count', data-col (aggregate column override), data-label (stack-mode label)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='checkbox']  <input>  optional  ‚Äî Checkbox for row selection
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='tfoot']  <tfoot>  optional  ‚Äî Table footer for totals; cells with data-aggregate recompute live over visible rows
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='group-header']  <tr>  optional  ‚Äî Category header row within grouped data; collapsible when the root has data-groupable, cells with data-aggregate + data-col show per-group totals
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='filter-row']  <tr>  optional  ‚Äî Second thead row holding per-column filter inputs
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='filter-input']  <input>  optional  ‚Äî Per-column filter input inside the filter row (auto-bound, debounced; numeric columns accept >, >=, <, <=, =, !=, and a..b ranges)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='filter']  <input>  optional  ‚Äî Global quick-filter input anywhere inside the root (auto-bound, debounced)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='expander']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Expand/collapse control for tree parents and group headers (auto-injected; leaf rows get an aligned placeholder span)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='drag-handle']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Row drag handle for pointer reordering; ArrowUp/ArrowDown on the focused handle moves the row
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='detail-row']  <tr>  optional  ‚Äî Master/detail expansion row placed immediately after its data row; it moves with the row through sorts and drags
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='row-toggle']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Button inside a data row that shows/hides its detail-row (aria-expanded reflects state)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='empty']  <tr>  optional  ‚Äî Empty-state row, shown automatically when no rows are visible (e.g. all filtered out)
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='cell-input']  <input>  optional  ‚Äî Inline cell editor input (created by the controller during editing)
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='resize-handle']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Column resize grip (injected by the controller when the root has data-resizable)
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| striped | `true`, `false` | `false` | `data-variant` | root |
| bordered | `true`, `false` | `false` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-column`, `remove-column`, `add-row`, `remove-row`, `change-size`, `toggle-striped`, `toggle-bordered`, `add-sortable`, `remove-sortable`, `restyle-header-background`, `add-footer-row`, `remove-footer-row`, `set-cell-alignment`, `set-cell-format`, `add-colspan`, `add-row-group`, `toggle-print-compact`, `add-filter-row`, `remove-filter-row`, `add-tree-levels`, `add-aggregate-cells`, `add-drag-handles`, `add-detail-rows`, `add-empty-state-row`, `toggle-multi-sort`, `toggle-editable`, `toggle-sticky-header`, `toggle-sticky-footer`, `pin-column`, `set-hide-below`, `set-persist-key`, `set-locale-currency`, `toggle-responsive-stack`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-table-semantics`, `remove-scope-col`, `remove-aria-sort`, `remove-checkbox-labels`, `remove-selection-checkboxes`, `remove-aria-level-from-tree-rows`, `remove-filter-input-labels`, `nest-detail-row-away-from-its-row`, `mix-tree-and-groupable-modes`, `put-data-level-on-group-headers`
- **A11y:** keys: Click header / Enter / Space on focused header, Click checkbox, Shift+Click checkbox or row, Arrow keys / Home / End / PageUp / PageDown, Enter / F2 on a cell, Enter / Escape / Tab in the editor, Space on a row cell, Ctrl/Cmd+A, ArrowUp / ArrowDown on a drag handle, Alt+ArrowLeft/Right on a header, Ctrl+Shift+ArrowLeft/Right on a header
- **Required ARIA:** `Proper table semantics (table, thead, tbody, tr, th, td)`; `scope="col" on th elements`; `aria-sort on sortable th elements (controller-managed)`; `aria-label on selection checkboxes`; `Tree mode adds role="treegrid" to the table element plus aria-level/aria-expanded to rows (controller-managed)`; `Expander and row-toggle buttons carry aria-expanded (controller-managed)`; `aria-label on filter inputs, drag handles, and expander buttons`

## tabs

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: navigation ¬∑ controller: createTabs()_

Accessible tabbed interface with keyboard navigation and panel switching

```html
<div data-ui="tabs" data-variant="{variant}">
  <div data-part="list" role="tablist">
    <button data-part="trigger" role="tab" id="{id}-tab-1" aria-controls="{id}-panel-1" aria-selected="true">{tab1}</button>
    <button data-part="trigger" role="tab" id="{id}-tab-2" aria-controls="{id}-panel-2" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">{tab2}</button>
  </div>
  <div data-part="panel" role="tabpanel" id="{id}-panel-1" aria-labelledby="{id}-tab-1">{content1}</div>
  <div data-part="panel" role="tabpanel" id="{id}-panel-2" aria-labelledby="{id}-tab-2" hidden>{content2}</div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='tabs']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='list']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Container for tab triggers with role=tablist
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Individual tab trigger with role=tab
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='panel']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Tab content panel with role=tabpanel
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| style | `underline`, `pill`, `enclosed` | `underline` | `data-variant` | root |
| size | `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md` | `data-size` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `add-tab`, `remove-tab`, `change-variant-style`, `change-size`, `restyle-tab-indicator`, `change-tab-content`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-tablist-role`, `remove-tab-role`, `remove-tabpanel-role`, `remove-aria-controls`, `remove-keyboard-navigation`
- **A11y:** role=tablist ¬∑ keys: ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, End
- **Required ARIA:** `role="tablist" on list`; `role="tab" on each trigger`; `role="tabpanel" on each panel`; `aria-selected on active trigger`; `aria-controls on trigger pointing to panel id`; `aria-labelledby on panel pointing to trigger id`

## toast

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: feedback ¬∑ controller: createToast()_

Auto-dismissing notification messages with stack management

```html
<div data-ui="toast" data-variant="{position}" data-part="container" role="region" aria-label="Notifications" id="{id}"></div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='toast']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='container']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Fixed-position toast stack container with role=region
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='toast']  <div>  optional  ‚Äî Individual toast notification with role=status
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='icon']  <span>  optional  ‚Äî Visual indicator icon for the toast tone
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='message']  <span>  required  ‚Äî Toast message text content
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='action']  <button>  optional  ‚Äî Optional action button with custom callback
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='close']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Dismiss button, must have aria-label
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| tone | `default`, `success`, `error`, `warning` | `default` | `data-variant` | toast |
| position | `top-right`, `top-left`, `bottom-right`, `bottom-left` | `top-right` | `data-variant` | container |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-position`, `change-auto-dismiss-duration`, `restyle-toast-background`, `customize-tone-colors`, `add-progress-bar`, `change-max-width`, `modify-enter-exit-animations`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-role-region`, `remove-aria-label`, `remove-role-status`, `remove-aria-live`, `remove-close-button`, `remove-auto-dismiss`
- **Required ARIA:** `role="region" on container`; `aria-label="Notifications" on container`; `role="status" on individual toasts`; `aria-live="polite" on individual toasts`; `aria-label on close button`

## tooltip

_kind: recipe ¬∑ category: overlay ¬∑ controller: createTooltip()_

Informational popup shown on hover or focus of trigger element

```html
<div data-ui="tooltip" data-variant="{position}" data-state="hidden">
  <button data-part="trigger" aria-describedby="{id}-content">{trigger_text}</button>
  <div data-part="content" id="{id}-content" role="tooltip" hidden>{tooltip_text}</div>
</div>
```

**Anatomy**

```text
[data-ui='tooltip']  ¬∑  <div> ¬∑ content: slots
‚îú‚îÄ [data-part='trigger']  <button>  required  ‚Äî Element that activates the tooltip on hover or focus
‚îî‚îÄ [data-part='content']  <div>  required  ‚Äî Tooltip content with role=tooltip, linked via aria-describedby on trigger
```

**Variants**

| Variant | Values | Default | Attribute | Applied to |
|---------|--------|---------|-----------|------------|
| position | `top`, `bottom`, `left`, `right` | `top` | `data-variant` | root |

- **Safe transforms:** `change-position`, `restyle-tooltip-background`, `change-tooltip-text`, `adjust-delay`, `customize-arrow`
- **Unsafe (never do):** `remove-role-tooltip`, `remove-aria-describedby`, `remove-escape-handler`, `remove-focus-trigger`
- **A11y:** keys: Escape
- **Required ARIA:** `role="tooltip" on content`; `aria-describedby on trigger pointing to content id`
